programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: While Jessica is in Atlanta to address mystery writers, a lethal virus is stolen from the Biological Research Institute.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: After a San Francisco radio station changes its music format from classical to rock, the promoter who engineered the switch dies and Jessica searches for the killer.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Newly successful mystery writer J.B. Fletcher gets involved in a murder at a New York publisher's costume bash.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: With her first hit mystery, Maine widow Jessica Fletcher makes a promotional trip to New York, and becomes involved in a murder at a publisher's costume bash.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A financier (Howard Duff), reportedly swept overboard during a hurricane, turns up in Jessica's yard disguised as a handyman.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica travels to San Francisco for a family wedding and discovers that the groom (Jeff Conaway) faces a murder charge.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica is suspected of a producer's murder after people hear her threatening to stop the victim from filming her new novel.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Soon after Mark's estranged daughter returns home, the Sloans receive word her husband has been murdered.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan must disprove the charges against a nurse when her former employer, a Malibu madam, is found murdered just prior to the release of her tell-all book.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Skeletal remains found during a ground-breaking ceremony are those of Mark's former mentor, who disappeared 30 years before.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan and private investigator Joe Mannix reopen a 25-year-old murder case in which the mob is suspected of killing an investigative reporter.

programme.title: Remington Steele
programme.desc: After being chosen as one of a magazine's five most eligible men, Steele feels threatened when two fellow honorees are slain.

programme.title: Remington Steele
programme.desc: Laura and Remington pose as trapeze-artist and fire-eater to investigate an old murder; guest A Martinez.

programme.title: Remington Steele
programme.desc: A mobster testifying for the government grabs Mildred, forcing Remington and Laura to guard his children on a drive to Phoenix.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Ben defends a gambling blues singer (Ron Taylor) accused of killing his bookmaker.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Ben uncovers information about a 15-year-old unsolved killing during his defense of a gambler accused of murder.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: A plastic surgeon is charged with the murder of his partner, but evidence later shows the doctor's twin brother may be the culprit.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Conrad and his fashion-model girlfriend ask Ben to defend a photographer who is accused of murdering a modeling agent.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: A movie star's former bodyguard, now a rebellious biker, is the primary suspect in the actor's murder.

programme.title: Jazz Ramsey: A K-9 Mystery
programme.desc: When Jazz Ramsey and her crime detection dog Zeus stumble upon an old crime scene, the K9 trainer, her star pup, and ex-boyfriend and lead detective Nick get into the investigation.

programme.title: Curious Caterer Mysteries
programme.desc: Goldy Berry caters a VIP concert and goes on a date with Tom.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica delves into two investigations when both her wealthy Southern cousin and his daughter die mysteriously.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica sets out to prove her secretary isn't a murder suspect.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica helps clear her neighbor (Van Johnson), an eccentric suspected of murdering with one of his inventions.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.sub-title: We're Off to Kill the Wizard
programme.desc: Murder ends a tycoon's (James Coco) plan to have Jessica design a house of horrors for one of his theme parks.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A friend (Hurd Hatfield) asks Jessica to help two Soviet dancers defect, unaware one (George de la Pena) is a murder suspect.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A hypnotist (Jose Ferrer) is murdered before a host of would-be witnesses who all were in a deep trance at the time.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica is asked to complete the last weeks of an expired congressman's term, and discovers politics is murder.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A Broadway legend's (Vivian Blaine) life is threatened after her daughter (Lorna Luft) is seriously injured in a mugging.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A talk-show host (Clive Revill) and a cab driver (Garrett Morris) help Jessica solve the murder of a New Orleans jazz musician.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.sub-title: My Johnny Lies Over the Ocean
programme.desc: On a pleasure cruise, Jessica's niece (Belinda Montgomery) receives flowers and messages from her late husband.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Murder is part of a legendary artist's (Cesar Romero) birthday celebration on a Mediterranean island paradise.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica cooperates with private detective Harry McGraw (Jerry Orbach), whose partner died while researching a murder trial.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica inherits part of a pro football team, but the owner's murder convinces her there is more roughness off the field than on.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica opposes an ambitious district attorney (Pat Harrington) who believes her poet friend (Paul Sand) killed a novelist.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Stranded at a roadside diner by a storm, bus passengers Jessica and Sheriff Tupper investigate the murder of a fellow traveler.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Hospitalized in Dallas after an airport accident, Jessica endures the inconvenience of a leg cast to probe an in-patient murder.

programme.title: Hannah Swensen Mysteries
programme.desc: Much to the dismay of her fiancé, Hannah investigates the discovery of a skeleton found amid the rubble of a building that's undergoing renovation.

programme.title: Hannah Swensen Mysteries
programme.desc: Hannah meets a new side of law and order as she investigates a murder and crosses paths with by-the-books prosecuting attorney Chad Norton; Delores has a secret.

programme.title: Crossword Mysteries
programme.desc: After several of the clues in her recent puzzles are linked to the murder of an art gallery owner, a crossword puzzle editor is drawn into the investigation; while searching for answers, she clashes with the no-nonsense detective overseeing the case.

programme.title: Family Practice Mysteries
programme.desc: A former Army surgeon moves back to her hometown and joins a practice of family doctors. However, her quiet life gets upended when she tries to solve the mysterious death of a patient.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica reunites with her college roommate at a desert resort and probes the murder of the woman's ex-husband.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: At a Wyoming rancher's grave, a man shocks mourners -- including the deceased's daughter -- by claiming to be the true heir.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica masquerades as a wealthy widow at a luxurious tropical hotel in an effort to trap the murderer of her good friend.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A cheap tycoon with many enemies is found dead on the construction site of his high-rise hotel.
